not_promoted: Template only; actual ChatGPT MCP app/connector host smoke evidence has not been produced.
Convert this template to a channel-smoke-plan with concrete host commands before running the smoke runner.

clean_environment.purpose: Prove the smoke runs from a clean ChatGPT developer/custom MCP connector profile with no prior Eve connector state influencing the result.
command_template: operator-run
Create or select a clean ChatGPT developer/custom MCP connector profile, confirm Eve is not already connected, and record the account/profile boundary.

entry_url.purpose: Prove the hosted ChatGPT connector entrypoint preserves chatgpt-app install_source through login redirect.
command_template: operator-run
Open ${EVE_PACK12_TARGET}/app/connect?install_source=chatgpt-app and confirm the Auth0 login URL preserves returnTo and install_source.

install_or_import.purpose: Import the hosted Eve remote MCP connector into ChatGPT developer/custom MCP flow.
command_template: operator-run
Add/import https://mcp.evemem.com/mcp as the Eve Memory remote MCP connector and confirm safe Eve tools are visible.

connect.purpose: Complete supported auth/account selection for the ChatGPT connector and prove the connected MCP tools are usable.
command_template: operator-run
Complete the hosted auth flow from ChatGPT and confirm Eve Memory is connected.

store.purpose: Store a synthetic Pack 12 smoke memory from the connected ChatGPT environment.
command_template: operator-run
Use ChatGPT's connected Eve MCP tool to store a unique synthetic memory containing ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

read.purpose: Read back the synthetic smoke memory from the same connected ChatGPT environment.
command_template: operator-run
Use ChatGPT's Eve MCP read/search tool to retrieve the synthetic memory containing ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

forget.purpose: Forget the synthetic smoke memory and prove cleanup completes.
command_template: operator-run
Use ChatGPT's Eve MCP forget/delete path to remove the synthetic smoke memory and confirm it no longer appears in read/search.

install_source_flow.purpose: Prove chatgpt-app attribution reaches hosted signup/first-memory attribution.
command_template: operator-run
Inspect server-side event/metric evidence and confirm install_source=chatgpt-app is preserved for the connector flow.

connector_install_completed.purpose: Exercise and verify the connector.install.completed event for the ChatGPT channel.
command_template: operator-run
Trigger connector.install.completed for chatgpt-app through the authenticated product path and verify the audit/metric event.

rollback_or_uninstall.purpose: Disconnect/remove the Eve remote MCP connector from the clean ChatGPT profile and prove rollback leaves no active Eve channel state.
command_template: operator-run
Run the documented disconnect/remove path in ChatGPT and verify Eve Memory is no longer connected.
